rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2021, line 1. PLAINTIFF TRACEY THOMPSON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD Hearing Required to address how this case will proceed: trial, guardian ad litem, 5 years. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2021, line 2. DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ONE, KAREN KATZ, 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Untimely opposition is stricken. Opposition was filed on January 4, 2021; The day a reply was due. No explanation provided for late-filed opposition and no request was made to file a late opposition. Motion for Attorney's Fees is granted, unopposed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2021, line 3. DEFENDANT FAY SERVICING, LLC, WILMINGTON TRUST, Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disregard And Set Aside And Referees Tentative Report And Recommendations Re Plaintiffs Motion For Sanctions And Objections Thereto is continued to January 22, 2021 on Court's own motion.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2021, line 4. DEFENDANT WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, NOT IN ITS DEMURRER to 3RD Amended COMPLAINT is continued to January 22, 2021 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TARA BROWN VS. LISA WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Tara Brown'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment And Appointment Of A Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 11, 2021, line 5. PLAINTIFF TARA BROWN Tara Brown'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment And Appointment Of A Referee Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. on January 11, 2020 Defendant to provide a supplemental brief listing facts that need to be determined by a trier of fact pertinent to Defendant's 50% ownership of the property, e.g. facts that would result in Defendant holding more or less than 50% ownership = (501/REQ)
